notes: I played through the tutorial with no issues. Used ultra settings at 4K without anything odd and got playable fps. Looking forward to playing this game on linux. No tweaks necessary.
title: Homeworld: Deserts of Kharak

notes: I had to add new mesa drivers from the ppa,install mesa-vulkan driver and then the 3d models appeared and the game worked perfectly, in elementary in order to add ppas install software-properties-common first, the you can also get ukuu for the new kernels.

title: Homeworld: Deserts of Kharak

notes: Game didn't boot at first. Tried to use Wine D3D which did not help. But adding "-force-d3d9" to the launch options seems to have done the trick. Played tutorial and first two missions with all graphical settings on ultra on 1440p and it's buttery smooth (though likely lacking some DirectX features).
title: Homeworld: Deserts of Kharak

notes: I was too quick with my previous report: switching Proton versions from 4.2-9 to 4.11-3 means I did not need to add "-force-d3d9" to the launch options anymore. Just replayed the second mission on 4.11-3 and it now works perfectly out of the box.
title: Homeworld: Deserts of Kharak

notes: Played first few missions without issue. Everything works except for alt-tabbing (to be expected for WINE/proton).
title: Homeworld: Deserts of Kharak

notes:
The game would randomly freeze in-game and when exiting. I would have to xkill or pkill it from my run menu since I couldn't actually see another screen.

Then I disabled D3d10 and D3d11 and then used Wine D9vk and all of those issues went away and the game plays as it should.

Launch Options: PROTON_USE_D9VK=1 PROTON_NO_D3D11=1 PROTON_NO_D3D10=1 %command%
title: Homeworld: Deserts of Kharak

notes: Had to run with these flags under Launch Options: ``PROTON_NO_D3D11=1 %command%``. Also had to downgrade my Proton version from 4.11-3 to 4.2-9 to get it to work. Runs perfectly fine after these 2 tweaks.
title: Homeworld: Deserts of Kharak

notes: Played most of the campaign and so far no issues, the only thing I had to do was to add the following to the launch options: PROTON_NO_D3D11=1 %command%
title: Homeworld: Deserts of Kharak
